target.title: [Repo Assist] test(shared): add 22 tests for ChannelStartResult and ConfigPatchResult computed properties
target.body:
🤖 *This PR was created by Repo Assist, an automated AI assistant.*

## Summary (Task 5 — Coding Improvements)

Adds 22 unit tests covering `ChannelStartResult.LooksLikeMissingPlugin` and `ConfigPatchResult.LooksLikeStaleBaseHash` — two computed boolean properties that had **zero test coverage** despite containing non-trivial pattern-matching logic.

## Why these properties matter

Both properties are UI-layer signals:

- **`LooksLikeMissingPlugin`** drives the "install the plugin on your gateway first" hint on the Channels page when a `channels.start` call fails with `"unknown channel: <id>"`.
- **`LooksLikeStaleBaseHash`** drives the "refresh config and retry" flow on the config patch page when the gateway rejects a write because another client changed the config concurrently.

A regex or string-match regression in either could silently suppress the hint, causing users to see generic "patch failed" errors rather than actionable guidance.

## Tests added (`ChannelResultTests.cs`, 22 tests)

### `ChannelStartResultTests`
| Test | What it covers |
|------|---------------|
| `LooksLikeMissingPlugin_IsTrueWhenErrorContainsUnknownChannel` (3 cases) | Case-insensitive match |
| `LooksLikeMissingPlugin_IsFalseForOtherErrors` (4 cases) | Null, unrelated errors |
| `LooksLikeMissingPlugin_IsFalseWhenOkTrueAndNoError` | Happy path |

### `ConfigPatchResultTests`
| Test | What it covers |
|------|---------------|
| `LooksLikeStaleBaseHash_IsTrueWhenErrorMentionsBaseHash` (3 cases) | Direct `baseHash` match |
| `LooksLikeStaleBaseHash_IsTrueWhenErrorMentionsStale` (2 cases) | Direct `stale` match |
| `LooksLikeStaleBaseHash_IsTrueWhenConflictAndHashCombined` (2 cases) | `conflict` + `hash` combo |
| `LooksLikeStaleBaseHash_IsFalseWhenConflictAlone` (3 cases) | Guards the `conflict_mode` property scenario documented in the source XML doc |
| `LooksLikeStaleBaseHash_IsFalseForOtherErrors` (3 cases) | Null, unrelated errors |
| `LooksLikeStaleBaseHash_IsFalseWhenOkTrue` | Happy path |

## Test Status

```
Passed!  - Failed: 0, Passed: 22, Skipped: 0, Total: 22
```

All 22 new tests pass. Full shared test suite: 1950 passed, 8 pre-existing Linux/WSL infrastructure failures (unchanged).
